title: Armor Cloths (Clothing Mod)
description: Adds clothing to the newer versions of Minecraft that allows you to roleplay with your friends!
body:
Armor cloth will add new clothes for you and your friends to roleplay with!

 

Though not alot is currently in the mod it plans to add lots of new clothing types!

Many of the clothing ideas will be taken from the comments at
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/armor-cloth-clothing-mod
So please post your ideas!

======================================================================================

Discontinued, may come back later

Currently working on it, will no longer be fabric unless requested for at my discord which is in progress of being created currently
